records.ety: [Cf. Pg. ema ostrich, F. mou, meu, emu.]

defs: A large Australian bird, of two species (Dromaius Novæ-Hollandiæ and D. irroratus), related to the cassowary and the ostrich. The emu runs swiftly, but is unable to fly.
notes: ☞ The name is sometimes erroneously applied, by the Brazilians, to the rhea, or South American ostrich.
